title: mentha jurana
intro: Mentha jurana, also known as Horsemint or Indian Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of menthone and other essential oils. The health benefits of Mentha jurana include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Mentha jurana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and easily accessible natural remedy.
